meta._repo_note: Template flow for Make. Export your working scenario from Make and replace this file for a production-ready blueprint.
meta.trigger: Airtable Watch records (Status=New) OR scheduled poll

flow.action: Raw Leads where Status = New (limit batch size)
Strip emojis; normalize whitespace; standardize currency e.g. $1,200 → 1200

routes.filter: title/description contains selling signals OR numeric price > 0
routes.label: Supply

flow.action: Extract keywords (stopwords removed) for overlap matching later
Table: Classified — link Raw Lead; set Supply/Demand label; Keywords; Standardized_Price; Clean_Location
